name: SCC_CreateChargingStatusRes_DIN
title: SCC_CreateChargingStatusRes_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateChargingStatusRes_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, byte StatusFlags[], char Notification[], char EVSEID[], long SAScheduleTupleId, long ReceiptRequired )
description: Creates a Charging Status Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
